about.title: Locksmith Services for Your Vehicle

about.p1: At Locksmith Solutions, we solve your car key and remote problems in one place. Our focus is to ensure you regain access to your vehicle and mobility quickly.

legal.privacidad_content:
Last update: 03/03/2026

We protect your privacy in accordance with data protection regulations (GDPR).

1. Data Controller

  • Owner: Elvis pinheiro da Silva de Jesus
  • DNI: 60680450X
  • Address: C. Pico Lobo, 7A, 03189 Orihuela, Alicante

2. Purpose

We process your personal data to answer inquiries, manage appointments, and provide requested services.

3. Your Rights

You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, deletion, and opposition by sending an email to locksmith.orihuela@gmail.com with a copy of your ID.
legal.cookies_policy_content:
This site uses cookies to improve the browsing experience and perform anonymous analysis.

What are cookies?

Small files that recognize your browser and save preferences.

Types of cookies

  • Technical: Essential for the website.
  • Analysis: Usage statistics.

    Management

    You can accept, reject, or configure cookies from your browser settings.

faq.title: We Solve Your Doubts
faq.a1: We are fast, honest specialists available 24/7 with an official guarantee on all our work.
faq.a2: You can call us or send a WhatsApp with a photo of your key or car to receive a free quote in minutes.
faq.a3: Yes, we open 99% of vehicles without causing damage and resolve lost key issues on the spot.
faq.a4: The price depends on the service, but we always offer competitive and transparent rates before starting the work.
faq.a5: Yes, we have a large stock of shells, blades, and remotes for most car brands on the market.
faq.a6: Absolutely! We handle emergencies every day of the year, including holidays and nights throughout the area.
